sfwmark.name: SFWMark
sfwmark.payload: keyed Fourier-domain latent watermark; repo CLI selects wm_type rather than arbitrary text payload
sfwmark.notes: Generation-time latent-noise watermarking. Detection uses DDIM inversion and Fourier-domain analysis.

gaussian-shannon.name: Gaussian Shannon
gaussian-shannon.payload: 256-bit message encoded with Gaussian/LDPC communication coding
gaussian-shannon.notes: Repo code is function-oriented rather than a polished CLI. Adapter should call infer.py functions or wrap them with a small CLI.

lawa.name: LaWa

default_config.default_prompt: A white plate of food on a dining table

lawa.payload: exactly 48 binary bits for the provided pretrained decoder
lawa.environment: conda env create -f environment.yml; tested with python 3.8.17, pytorch 2.0.1, cuda 11.3
lawa.notes: In-generation image watermarking through Stable Diffusion v1.4 and a modified decoder. Public script does not expose arbitrary uploaded-image embedding.
